text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're here at the Grand Prix of dreams, the
Arima Kinen. Everyone has their eyes on the star
Umamusume, Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's rumored that Oguri Cap has been in poor form
recently, but she laughs fearlessly despite the
overwhelming pressure.
